A Japanese site and her official site state [http://www.unkar.org/read/news24.2ch.net/moeplus/1207932511 it was later] [http://kotochawan.com/main/?itemid=208 diagnosed as benign]. ==Links== [http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/people.php?id=720 Anime News Network Encyclopedia]

html:
Kotono Mitsuishi
Characters voiced Misato Katsuragi
Birthday 12-08-1967


A selection of other roles played by Kotono Mitsuishi[edit]

Angelic Layer as Shouko Asami

Blue Seed as Koume Sawaguchi

Dragon Half as Mink

Ebichu Minds the House as Ebichu

Excel Saga as Excel

Great Teacher Onizuka as Urumi Kanzaki

Maze as Maze (female)

Mobile Suit Gundam Seed as Murrue Ramius

Noir as Mireille Bouquet

Revolutionary Girl Utena as Juri Arisugawa

Sailor Moon, (and Sailor Moon R, S, Super S & Sailor Stars) as Usagi Tsukino/Sailor Moon

Sugar, a Little Snow Fairy as Ginger

The Irresponsible Captain Tylor as Kim Kyung Hwa

Those Who Hunt Elves as Celsia Marie Claire

and many others....

Notes[edit]

  • Once worked part-time as an elevator girl in the famous Sunshine 60 building in Ikekuburo, Tokyo.
  • Prior to her first anime role, she worked on a PR video for a power plant in Hokkaido.
  • A Ebichu manga fanatic, Kotono personally lobbied for the voice role in the anime until she won it.
  • Posts from the year 2007 and 2008 state that she has breast cancer according to her official web page. A Japanese site and her official site state it was later diagnosed as benign.

Links[edit]

A selection of other roles played by Kotono Mitsuishi
Angelic Layer as Shouko Asami

Blue Seed as Koume Sawaguchi

Dragon Half as Mink

Ebichu Minds the House as Ebichu

Excel Saga as Excel

Great Teacher Onizuka as Urumi Kanzaki

Maze as Maze (female)

Mobile Suit Gundam Seed as Murrue Ramius

Noir as Mireille Bouquet

Revolutionary Girl Utena as Juri Arisugawa

Sailor Moon, (and Sailor Moon R, S, Super S & Sailor Stars) as Usagi Tsukino/Sailor Moon

Sugar, a Little Snow Fairy as Ginger

The Irresponsible Captain Tylor as Kim Kyung Hwa

Those Who Hunt Elves as Celsia Marie Claire

and many others....

Notes
 Once worked part-time as an elevator girl in the famous Sunshine 60 building in Ikekuburo, Tokyo.
 Prior to her first anime role, she worked on a PR video for a power plant in Hokkaido.
 A Ebichu manga fanatic, Kotono personally lobbied for the voice role in the anime until she won it.
Posts from the year 2007 and 2008 state that she has breast cancer according to her official web page. A Japanese site and her official site state it was later diagnosed as benign.
